title: Using a 1:25000 scale Ordnance Survey map and compass, navigate along a course of at least six 'legs'.
notes: Navigate along a course of at least six 'legs' to the standard of the Hill and Moorland Leader award provided by Mountain Training. You're not expected to hold this award - just have a look at the course to get an idea of the level you need to achieve. Find out more on [Mountain Training's website](https://www.mountain-training.org/).
